payload.text: Since the last digest (evt-2026-07-22-digest-1), twelve log entries closed out two full research lines. On the equity blend axis: dual-momentum-equity-bond-gold as a third blend leg regressed the vault's 2-leg blend (0.863 vs 0.884266) because its cross-sectional construction reuses tsmom-spy-qqq's own SPY logic under the hood (0.5852 correlation to it, higher than the two existing legs' own 0.5522). tsmom-tlt-gld -- absolute momentum reused completely unmodified on TLT/GLD, sharing zero symbols with either existing leg -- measured near-zero correlation (0.0051/0.0689) despite a weak standalone Sharpe (0.173), and blending it in produced tsmom-ms-shift-tltgld-blend: Sharpe 0.989632, Sortino 1.506836, the new vault-best result, missing the 1.0 Sharpe gate by just 1.0% -- the closest any strategy here has ever come (previous closest was 11.6% short). Stays retired per the unchanged gate, consistent with the earlier human decision not to loosen it for near-misses. A new postmortem (blend-leg-search-2026-07-22) closed the axis, recording a reusable finding for future leg selection -- correlation to existing legs matters more than a candidate's own standalone strength -- and documented a joint human/agent decision not to chase a fourth leg, since no remaining low-correlation candidate exists in the pinned universe without either a data-range mismatch (crypto) or repeating dual-momentum's correlated-not-diversifying outcome (the other pinned equity/sector symbols). Separately, crypto was tested as its own comparison rather than grafted onto the equity blend: ms-shift-btc-eth (structure-break + displacement, unmodified, no calendar conversion needed) scored Sharpe 0.559667, the strongest single crypto leg yet, with moderate correlation (0.4319) to tsmom-btc-eth and near-coin-flip raw signal agreement -- but blending the two reversed the equity pattern, landing at 0.406965, below the stronger leg alone, because the two crypto legs are 2.55x apart in individual strength versus the equity legs' 7% gap. That result refined the blend postmortem's finding: correlation is necessary but not sufficient for equal-weight blending to help; comparable leg strength matters too. Open question for the next research pass: is the highest-value remaining lever a genuinely larger, more diversified cross-sectional universe (a real data-pinning investment, not yet attempted, flagged twice by sector-rotation and dual-momentum-equity-bond-gold), or should backtest-only research on the current fixed 2016-2024/2021-2024 windows pause here -- the 0.989632 near-miss is now close enough to the standing 1.0 gate that further recombination on the same fixed samples risks tuning against them rather than finding new edge.
